issues.comment: totpStep1 contains Italian text 'Installa una delle seguenti applicazioni sul tuo cellulare:' but should contain Lithuanian text, causing incorrect language display for Lithuanian users.
totpStep1 contains Traditional Chinese text '在您的手機上安裝以下應用程式之一：' but should contain Simplified Chinese text, causing incorrect character display for Simplified Chinese users.

totpStep1 contains Traditional Chinese text '在您的手機上安裝以下應用程式之一：' (using 機, 應用程式) but should contain Simplified Chinese text since this is the Simplified Chinese locale file (_zh_CN.properties), causing Traditional Chinese to appear for Simplified Chinese users.
